query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A person crouches with knees spread, wearing a light-wash denim jacket and matching jeans over a purple-and-white striped shirt, green crew socks, and white sneakers with red accents. They give a thumbs-up with one hand while holding up a CD case with bold yellow and red cover art in the other. The individual has light brown hair pulled back, wears a necklace and rings, and has their mouth open in an exuberant expression. The subject is isolated against a solid black background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person crouches with knees spread, wearing a light-wash denim jacket and matching jeans over a purple-and-white striped shirt, green crew socks, and white sneakers with red accents. They give a thumbs-up while holding up a CD case with bold cover art, mouth open in an exuberant expression. Harsh direct flash illuminates the scene, creating bright specular hotspots on their face and the reflective CD case, hard shadows behind the figure, and a stark high-contrast look that evokes raw snapshot photography against a crushed black background.
